figures.caption: Table 7: Ablation study: contribution of each Aethelgard component (100 tasks per condition, 4 benign categories).
Table 5: Adversarial outcomes across both models. Attack success rate: 0%.

Figure 1: Aethelgard four-layer governance architecture. The Capability Governor restricts the agent’s awareness before each session. The Safety Router intercepts every tool call after the LLM responds. The RL Policy trains on the audit log to learn the minimum viable tool set per task type.
